name: Can AEO software show us how often our competitors are being cited in AI answers compared to us?

mainEntity.name: Can AEO software show us how often our competitors are being cited in AI answers compared to us?

acceptedAnswer.text:
Yes, many AEO platforms can log where competitors are cited in AI answers and for which queries, giving you a view of their AI-era share of voice. This lets you see which topics they dominate and where there’s room for you to become an alternative or complementary source.

It’s similar to competitive SEO analysis, but focused on AI answer inclusion instead of SERP rankings.

Key factors:
- Ability to track competitor domains and brand names in AI outputs
- Topic-level reporting on who appears for which questions
- Overlap between competitor and your priority queries
- Insights into their content or schema strategies

Use these competitive views to prioritize topics where you’re absent but competitors are present, then design content and Q&A that better serve those questions. Avoid simply copying their approach; aim to add clarity or depth.

Position AEO as a way to understand and respond to competitive dynamics in AI search, not just your own performance.
acceptedAnswer.description: Many AEO tools can track competitor citations and mentions in AI answers, revealing which brands dominate which questions. You can then prioritize topics where competitors appear but you don’t, and create better-structured, more authoritative content to win share of voice in those AI-generated responses.
